body:
# Port Jervis vs Warwick

Both towns are top choices for relocating buyers, but they fit different lifestyles and budgets.

## Port Jervis

- Higher average home price
- Strong school reputation
- Larger lot sizes in many neighborhoods

## Warwick

- Strong village and waterfront feel
- Excellent commuter rail access
- More walkable town center options

## Which is right for you?

If schools and larger homes are priority one, Port Jervis may fit better. If walkability and coastal lifestyle matter most, Warwick often wins.
title: Port Jervis vs Warwick: Neighborhood Guide for 2026 Buyers
author: marcus-johnson
excerpt: Compare school districts, commute times, home styles, and budget ranges side by side.
